source: lolmix-server POST /analyze and lolmix --json share this response shape

units.wr: Win rate as a decimal fraction. Display 0.527 as 52.7%.
units.pr: Pick rate as a decimal fraction. Display 0.312 as 31.2%.
units.score: Recommendation score as a decimal fraction, usually displayed as signed percentage points. Display 0.034 as +3.4%.
units.delta: Delta values are decimal win-rate deltas. Display with signed percent formatting.
units.n: Sample count. total_n_max is a max across overlapping pages, not a sum.

top_level_fields.champion_id: Riot champion id for the selected champion.
top_level_fields.champion_name: Display name for the selected champion.
top_level_fields.lane: Selected champion lane: top, jungle, middle, bottom, or support.
top_level_fields.patch: Lolalytics patch selector. DraftGap currently uses 30 for last 30 days.
top_level_fields.top_n: Requested truncation limit or null. Some sections may remain untruncated.
top_level_fields.sections_requested: Requested visible sections, or null if defaulted.
top_level_fields.sections_returned: Section names present in stable order.
top_level_fields.enemies: Normalized enemy picks used in the analysis.

enemy_fields.slot: Matchup slot relative to the selected champion. The direct lane opponent is slot lane.

warning_fields.slot: Optional matchup slot affected by the warning.

section_fields.name: Section id such as starters, rune_page, winning_items, or skill_early.
section_fields.entries: Array of recommendation entries. May be empty.

entry_fields.id: Numeric id for the entry. For items/runes this is normally the game id. For compound rows it can be synthetic.
entry_fields.name: Display name or encoded key. rune_page entries use an encoded key and must be parsed before display.
entry_fields.section: Section id repeated on the entry.
entry_fields.score: Overall recommendation score after base and matchup adjustment.
entry_fields.overall_wr: Base win rate before matchup blending.
entry_fields.overall_pr: Base pick rate before matchup blending.
entry_fields.combined_wr: Lane-priority-weighted win rate across base and matchup pages, with shrinkage.
entry_fields.combined_pr: Lane-priority-weighted pick rate across base and matchup pages, with shrinkage.
entry_fields.min_delta: Worst available matchup delta for this entry.
entry_fields.max_delta: Best available matchup delta for this entry.
entry_fields.total_n_max: Maximum sample count across overlapping matchup pages. Do not sum overlapping pages.
entry_fields.per_matchup: Map from slot to raw per-matchup entry or null.

per_matchup_fields.id: Entry id in that matchup page.
per_matchup_fields.name: Entry display name in that matchup page.
per_matchup_fields.wr: Raw matchup win rate as decimal fraction.
per_matchup_fields.pr: Raw matchup pick rate as decimal fraction.
per_matchup_fields.delta1: Primary raw delta as decimal fraction.
per_matchup_fields.delta2: Secondary raw delta retained from source.

slots.name: lane
slots.meaning: Direct opponent in the selected champion's lane. This should be the most prominent matchup slot.

slots.name: top
slots.meaning: Enemy top as contextual team-composition pressure unless the selected champion is top, in which case direct opponent maps to lane.

slots.name: middle
slots.meaning: Enemy mid context unless direct opponent maps to lane.

request_payload_summary.enemy_rule: DraftGap sends only locked enemy picks with known roles.

ui_states.not-configured: No host configured. Show compact setup/config message.
ui_states.invalid-draft: Selected champion, selected role, dataset, or build pick is missing. Show the specific reason.
ui_states.idle: Connected and valid request exists but recommendations have not been fetched yet.
ui_states.loading: Fetch in progress. Preserve layout stability.
ui_states.unavailable: Local lolmix-server is not reachable. Show host/port and the command to run.
ui_states.validation-error: lolmix-server rejected the request. Show message and field details.
ui_states.unexpected-error: Server returned an unexpected shape or server-side error.
ui_states.success: Response parsed and should be rendered. Warnings may still be present.

important_contract_constraints: Do not require lolmix to be installed for DraftGap to run.
Do not import Python or lolmix code into DraftGap.
Preserve warnings in the UI without hiding recommendations.
Do not hide backing rune detail sections from the data model; use them to enrich rune_page rendering.
winning_items should headline combined_wr, not score.
skill_early should be rendered as a stable early-level skill board, not as a normal truncated list.
Unknown future sections should degrade to a generic ranked list.
